description_long: This is a detached residential house with a prominent gable roof and a covered front porch supported by columns. The house is surrounded by a neatly maintained lawn, several mature trees, and a paved driveway leading to a detached garage at the rear. The front yard features a walkway, flower beds, and a swing set, while the backyard includes a patio area and additional landscaping. The exterior walls appear to be clad in light-colored siding, and the windows are symmetrically arranged with decorative trim. The property is enclosed by a low white fence, and the overall layout suggests a suburban Craftsman-style home with family-friendly outdoor spaces.
description: A light-colored, gable-roofed Craftsman-style house with a covered porch, detached garage, and landscaped yard featuring trees, a swing set, and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and flower beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, detached garage, backyard patio, and the arrangement of trees and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, patio area, swing set, and the detached garage structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional trees, and the full extent of the property boundary and fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, steps, and a central door flanked by windows
